services.summary: Removes hardened tartar above and below the gumline using ultrasonic scaling, then polishes away surface stains from coffee, tea, and tobacco.
services.name: Scaling & Polishing
services.tagline: Professional cleaning for healthy gums and a brighter smile.

services.summary: Composite (tooth-coloured) fillings repair decay, cracks, and minor fractures while preserving natural tooth structure. Glass ionomer fillings — which release fluoride — are also available.
services.name: Tooth-Coloured Fillings
services.tagline: Restore cavities with composite that matches your natural tooth.

services.summary: Advanced tooth extraction procedures, including surgical and wisdom tooth extractions, performed with precision under local anaesthesia to ensure patient comfort and optimal healing.
services.name: Tooth Extraction
services.tagline: Painless removal when a tooth can no longer be saved.
benefits: Eliminates pain and Stops the further spread of infection

services.summary: Restore damaged, weakened, or root canal-treated teeth with durable Zirconia and PFM crowns designed for strength, function, and natural aesthetics. Our custom dental bridges replace missing teeth, restore chewing ability, maintain proper bite alignment, and prevent neighboring teeth from drifting into empty spaces, helping preserve your long-term oral health and smile confidence.
services.name: Dental Crowns & Bridges
services.tagline: Durable restorations that look and feel natural.

services.summary: Complete, partial, and implant-supported dentures designed to fit comfortably, restore chewing and speech, and bring back your confident smile.
services.name: Dentures
services.tagline: Custom-made replacements for multiple missing teeth.

services.summary: Porcelain veneers, composite veneers, and ultra-thin no-prep laminates are custom-designed cosmetic dental restorations that enhance the colour, shape, size, and alignment of teeth. Ideal for correcting stains, chips, gaps, worn teeth, and minor alignment concerns, veneers provide a natural-looking, long-lasting smile makeover with minimal tooth preparation.
services.name: Veneers & Laminates
services.tagline: Transform stained, chipped, or uneven teeth into a confident smile.

services.summary: Fixed metal braces gently move teeth into proper alignment using continuous, gentle pressure. Suitable for crowding, spacing, and bite issues.
services.name: Braces

services.summary: Custom-made clear aligners offer a discreet and comfortable way to straighten teeth without traditional braces. These transparent aligners are replaced every 1–2 weeks to gradually move teeth into alignment and can be removed for eating, brushing, and flossing. Ideal for teenagers and working professionals, clear aligner treatment effectively addresses mild to moderate crowding, spacing, and bite concerns while maintaining your confidence throughout treatment.
services.name: Clear Aligners
services.tagline: Nearly invisible, removable trays that straighten teeth discreetly.

services.summary: Thin protective coatings painted onto the deep grooves of molars and premolars where toothbrushes can't reach. Quick, painless, and lasts 3–10 years.
services.name: Pit & Fissure Sealants
services.tagline: Reduces decay risk by up to 80%.

services.summary: Concentrated fluoride coating painted onto teeth. Strengthens enamel, remineralises weak areas, slows cavity-causing bacteria, and helps stop early decay. Safe for toddlers, children, and adults.
services.name: Fluoride Varnish
services.tagline: A quick, painless coating that strengthens enamel and fights cavities.
process: Fluoride gel or Varnish painted on to the teeth

services.summary: Pulpotomy and pulpectomy are effective pediatric dental treatments that save infected or severely decayed baby teeth by removing damaged pulp tissue and restoring the tooth's health and function. As a gentle alternative to extraction, these procedures help maintain space for permanent teeth, support normal chewing and speech development, and keep your child's smile healthy until the baby tooth falls out naturally.
services.name: Pulp Therapy (Kids)
services.tagline: Saves baby teeth from severe decay and infection.

services.summary: Pediatric dental crowns are tooth-shaped protective caps designed to restore severely decayed, weakened, or fractured baby teeth. We offer durable stainless steel crowns for long-lasting protection and aesthetic tooth-coloured zirconia crowns for a natural appearance. These restorations help preserve baby teeth, maintain proper chewing function, support speech development, and hold space for the healthy eruption of permanent teeth.
services.name: Pediatric Dental Crowns
services.tagline: Stainless steel and zirconia crowns that protect damaged baby teeth.
benefits: Lasts until the tooth falls out

services.summary: Space maintainers are custom-designed fixed or removable dental appliances used when a baby tooth is lost prematurely. By preserving the space needed for permanent teeth to erupt correctly, they help prevent crowding, shifting of neighbouring teeth, bite problems, and future orthodontic complications, reducing the likelihood of extensive braces treatment later in life.
services.name: Space Maintainers
services.tagline: Holds the gap when a baby tooth is lost too early.

services.summary: Custom-fitted mouth guards absorb impact and prevent broken or knocked-out teeth, lip and tongue cuts, and jaw injuries. Essential for contact sports and kids in braces.
services.name: Mouth Guards for Kids
services.tagline: Custom protection for sports and orthodontic patients.

services.summary: Emergency response for falls, sports injuries, and accidents. Quick action — within 30–60 minutes for permanent teeth — gives the best chance of saving the tooth.
services.name: Dental Trauma (Kids)
services.tagline: Same-day care for chipped, knocked-out, or displaced teeth.

services.summary: Pediatric nutritional counselling is designed to support your child's oral and overall health through healthy dietary habits. Our Pediatric dentist evaluates eating patterns, bottle-feeding practices, snacking habits, and sugar consumption, providing personalised guidance on tooth-friendly nutrition and balanced meal planning. By promoting healthy food choices early, we help reduce the risk of cavities, support proper dental development, and encourage lifelong oral health.
services.name: Diet Counselling (Kids)
services.tagline: Personalised guidance to prevent early-childhood cavities.
services.contentFile: Diet Counselling by a Paediatric Dentist.md
